scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points from gold standard: change/task structure, state persistence, CLI commands, API wait endpoint, ops library auto-waiting. Also adds correct extra detail about exec/process.wait() and Go client.
scores.hallucination_notes: PEBBLE_PERSIST=never environment variable and client.WaitChange() Go method may not exist as described — these are plausible but not verifiable against gold standard. Minor concern only.
